# Next Step Rubric

Use this rubric to score and rank candidate tasks for the next loop iteration.

## Scoring Model

Score each category from 1-5 and multiply by weight.

| Category | Weight | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Strategic Alignment | 0.30 | How strongly the task advances the North Star |
| Impact | 0.25 | Expected improvement in capability, reliability, or velocity |
| Unblock Value | 0.20 | How much future work this unlocks |
| Risk | 0.15 | Delivery and regression risk (lower risk scores higher) |
| Verification Cost | 0.10 | Ease of proving success with concrete evidence |

## Candidate Evaluation Template

| Candidate | Alignment | Impact | Unblock | Risk | Verify | Weighted Total |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Candidate A |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Candidate B |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| Candidate C |  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Selection Rules

- Choose the highest weighted total unless a hard constraint disqualifies it.
- Record explicit reasons for rejecting lower-ranked candidates.
- Include confidence level and key assumptions in the handoff.
